title: Magebean External Magento Audit
description: Publicly observable Magento checks that require only a store URL.

messages.pass: Directory listing is disabled for public paths.
messages.fail: Directory listing is enabled on at least one public path. Disable autoindex/listing.

messages.pass: HTTP traffic is redirected to HTTPS on the same host.
messages.fail: The public HTTP endpoint does not redirect securely to HTTPS on the same host.

messages.pass: HSTS is present on the public HTTPS response.
messages.fail: HSTS is missing or incomplete on the public HTTPS response.

messages.pass: TLS is configured to use version 1.2 or higher.
messages.fail: The public endpoint allows an outdated TLS protocol or does not meet TLS 1.2+.

rules.title: No mixed content in rendered storefront

messages.pass: No insecure HTTP references were detected in rendered storefront markup.
messages.fail: Mixed content was detected in rendered storefront markup.

rules.title: Secure flags on publicly observed session cookies

messages.pass: Observed sensitive cookies use Secure, HttpOnly, and an allowed SameSite policy.
messages.fail: At least one observed sensitive cookie is missing a required security flag.

rules.title: No Xdebug headers exposed
remediation: Disable or remove the Xdebug zend_extension and xdebug.* settings from the production PHP configuration, then restart PHP-FPM or the web server.
Remove X-Debug-Token, X-Debug-Token-Link, X-PHPDebug, and other Xdebug-related response headers at the application, web server, reverse proxy, or CDN layer.
Purge reverse-proxy/CDN caches and verify the public response headers again.

messages.pass: No Xdebug headers are exposed by the public endpoint.
messages.fail: Xdebug-related headers are exposed by the public endpoint.

rules.title: No public error or stack trace disclosure

messages.pass: No error or stack trace disclosure was observed on public pages.
messages.fail: An error or stack trace was exposed on a public page.

messages.pass: The storefront exposes deployed static assets.
messages.fail: Deployed static assets could not be confirmed from the public storefront.

messages.pass: Public response headers contain full-page cache signals.
messages.fail: Full-page cache signals were not observed on the public endpoint.
